applied_optimizations.name: Baseline PyTorch ConvTranspose2d wrapper
applied_optimizations.description: Created ModelNew class wrapping nn.ConvTranspose2d with matching parameter names for correct weight initialization

attempted_but_failed.name: Input expansion + regular conv2d
attempted_but_failed.reason: Mathematical equivalence is complex with stride/dilation

notes: Transposed convolution with stride=5, dilation=2, kernel_size=3 is already highly optimized by MIOpen
Main bottleneck (65.9%) is batched_transpose kernel - inherent to transposed conv algorithm
torch.compile adds overhead without benefit for this operation on ROCm
Achieving speedup would require fundamental algorithm change or custom Triton kernel that fuses transpose+GEMM
Current baseline: REF=0.981ms, New=0.980ms, speedup=1.001x, SCORE=60.0
Stage 1 complete - baseline established and profiling done
